issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' not 'OnAttacked'. The effect occurs when opponent declares an attack, which is the attack declaration phase, not after being attacked.

Duration should be 'DuringOpponentTurn' not missing. Card text states 'during this battle' which occurs on opponent's turn. Per duration rules, opponent turn effects must explicitly use 'DuringOpponentTurn' duration, not 'EndOfBattle'.
Card text says 'You may trash' — action should include optional:true flag
